mapper.select:
select uq.id, uq.user_id, uq.content, uq.ai_answer, uq.admin_reply, uq.key_word, uq.status, uq.created_at,
ui.`name` as userName, ui.images as userImages
from user_questions uq left join user_info ui on (ui.id = uq.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND uq.content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.content},'%')
AND uq.status = #{queryFrom.status}
order uq.created_at desc
